text.title: Go Standard Layout — Layer Dependency Rules Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules every Go Standard Layout — Layer Dependency Rules application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Project MUST use depguard (or equivalent) to enforce import direction; manual review is insufficient.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: depguard docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Handler packages MUST import the service interface from `internal/service`, never the implementation.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Hexagonal architecture. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Service packages MUST import the repository interface, never the SQL / Redis driver directly.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Hexagonal architecture. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Repository packages MUST implement the interface defined in the service layer; never the reverse.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Interface-segregation principle. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Lower layers MUST NEVER import upper layers (`repository` cannot import `handler`).
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Layered architecture. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: CI MUST block merge on lint failure; manual overrides require ADR.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Internal CI policy. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: `.aidocs/stack.md` MUST link to the depguard rules so agents can read them.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: SDD methodology. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold and no duplicate exists.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.

rule.statement: Update the existing artefact in place (bump version, refresh last_reviewed).
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when a duplicate is found.
